summary: R3 fixes QA R2 copy leakage by replacing player-visible appointments drawer read-model/GameCommand wording with court-facing language and strengthening the appointment-error task rail regression to open the appointments drawer in both English and Chinese before scanning the full task rail text for implementation jargon.
commit: 6e94d5f0; no commit made, review the working tree diff
requested_action: Review the R3 copy and regression fixes for M7-TASK-RAIL-COLLAPSED-DRAWERS-001.

qa_r2_findings_response.finding: Expanded appointments drawer exposed `Appointment is rejected by the read model` / `只读模型拒绝此任命`.
qa_r2_findings_response.response: Fixed. `appointment.preview.rejectedTitle` now uses player-facing language: `Appointment cannot be confirmed yet` / `暂时不能确认任命`.

qa_r2_findings_response.finding: Expanded appointments drawer exposed `standard appointment GameCommand` and command-path wording.
qa_r2_findings_response.response: Fixed. `appointment.result.commandParity` now says `Confirmation sends the same formal order used by the court systems.` / `确认会提交宫廷系统采用的同一类正式命令。`

qa_r2_findings_response.finding: Task rail appointment-error regression did not open the appointments drawer and did not reject all requested terms.
qa_r2_findings_response.response: Fixed. The e2e regression now clicks `[data-task-rail-card-kind="appointments"]` for both en-US and zh-CN, reads the full task rail text, and rejects `read model`, `read-model`, `GameCommand`, `command path`, `internal jargon`, `raw reason`, `reason-code`, `只读模型`, `命令路径`, `内部原因码`, `内部术语`, and `原始原因码`.

qa_r2_findings_response.finding: Older tests still required leaked terms.
qa_r2_findings_response.response: Fixed. Existing appointment e2e assertions now expect the new court-facing formal-order copy and the new rejected preview title.

tests_run.result: Working tree has modified R3 files only: packages/ui/src/i18n.ts and tests/e2e/web-shell.spec.ts. No commit made.
Task list loaded; M7-TASK-RAIL-COLLAPSED-DRAWERS-001 remains IN_PROGRESS for client_engineer.
Command completed with no ready-task output.
Vite production build passed. Existing chunk-size warnings for lib/main chunks over 500 kB remain.
Playwright passed: 25/25 tests, including expanded appointments drawer task rail jargon checks in en-US and zh-CN.
Passed format:check, lint, typecheck, and architecture:check.

decisions: Kept the R2 first-screen layout unchanged because QA R2 marked it resolved.
Limited R3 implementation to player-facing appointment drawer copy and e2e regression coverage.
Preserved existing read-model and command/query architecture in code while removing implementation terms from player-mode task rail text.
risks: Other debug/map surfaces still contain read-model terminology by design; the R3 regression is scoped to the player-facing task rail requested by QA.
Build still reports pre-existing chunk-size warnings over 500 kB; this task did not address bundling.
